title: Oisin in the Land of Youth
description: The warrior-poet Oisin rides to the Land of Youth with Niamh, returns 300 years later to find Ireland changed forever.
introduction: The warrior-poet Oisin rides to the Land of Youth with Niamh, returns 300 years later to find Ireland changed forever.

translation.original_text: La linn d'Fhionn is d'Fhiannaibh Fáil, do chuireamar sealg ar siúl.
translation.text: In the time of Fionn and the Fianna of Ireland, we set out on a hunt.
